genre_preference.value: sci-fi, drama, comedy, thriller, political intrigue
evidence: "I love it. Although I don't mention the other characters, I enjoy them too. I've always liked Howard."
"if you're looking for no-thinking-required action/thriller, this movie is for you."
"The plot is complicated and interesting and I liked the characters."
"I liked the twists of the story and the cleverness of David Tennant's character in getting revenge."
"It's reasonably funny. MMc is in basically the same role she usually has but she's good."
"I found the movie to be not as suspenseful nor as enjoyable, but Matt Damon is still an excellent Mark Watney."
"I have the collector's edition that was released a few years ago and the discs were poorly produced and have a lot of playback problems."
"I really like the interactions between Sherlock and John Watson. Sherlock can be a jerk and insensitive, but he's also funny and fun to watch."

brand_loyalty.value: David Tennant, Gillian Anderson, Matt Damon, Benedict Cumberbatch
evidence: "It's David Tennant, so of course it's excellent."
"Maggie Gyllenhaal is amazing. Really liked Stephen Rea as well."
"I love the exploration of adult themes."
"The chemistry between Martin Freeman and Benedict Cumberbatch is great."
"I absolutely adore this show. In fact, I'm going to purchase the season one dvd right now!"

summary: The user has a strong preference for complex narratives and character-driven stories, particularly in the sci-fi and drama genres. They show high sensitivity to production quality and have a fondness for specific actors and shows, indicating a deep emotional connection to the content they enjoy.
